description_1: I’m a Malmo-based software developer passionate about artificial intelligence, data processing, and self-hosted cloud infrastructure.
description_2: I build scalable AI systems, vector-powered search tools, and full-stack applications that combine open-source technologies with real-world automation.

experience.title: Technical, AI and Automation Advisor
experience.description: Took full ownership of building and shipping an end-to-end AI platform from scratch, rapidly designing data pipelines, AI agents, and RAG systems to solve real-world problems. Set up and deployed cloud infrastructure, integrated LLMs with SQL and MongoDB via production APIs, and delivered full-stack applications (frontend + backend) to support core business operations in a fast-paced environment.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: As a paid intern, contributed to full-stack development with a primary focus on frontend, building user-facing features using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Developed AI-driven workflows, chatbots, and recommendation systems, while collaborating on backend integrations (Python, GCP, AWS) in an agile environment.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Contributed to the development of a web application for monitoring and managing IoT devices (repeaters and access points) across industrial and construction environments. Focused on frontend features, building interfaces to visualize real-time data and enable remote device configuration.

principal.title: DeepPolitik
principal.description: Full-stack RAG system enabling natural language search over Spanish parliamentary data, combining semantic retrieval (pgvector), keyword search, and LLM-based reranking to return relevant speeches, transcripts, and video timestamps. Implemented entity resolution, deduplication pipelines, and scalable data infrastructure with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and FastAPI
principal.short_description: AI powered search engine for Spanish parliamentary data.

principal.title: WordAlerts
principal.description: AI pipeline for ingesting news and Telegram data, enriching it with NLP/LLMs, and clustering articles into real-world events using vector similarity and HDBSCAN. Designed multi-source ingestion, embedding pipelines, and event assignment systems, exposing results via FastAPI  and full-stack applications (Next.js/NestJS).
principal.short_description: Automated event data-pipeline for real-time news and Telegram monitoring with AI enrichment.

principal.title: DeepAgents
principal.description: Full-stack platform for creating and deploying customizable AI agents that can be embedded into external applications, enabling intelligent user interactions beyond traditional chat interfaces. The system allows businesses to configure assistants with their own data, define behavior and boundaries, and return structured responses with dynamic UI elements (e.g., forms, flows, actions) instead of plain text
principal.short_description: AI agents for intelligent user interactions.

open_source.title: News Ingestion Pipeline
open_source.description: AI-powered pipeline for scraping, cleaning, and enriching news articles with NLP/LLMs.
open_source.short_description: AI-powered pipeline for scraping, cleaning, and enriching news articles with NLP/LLMs.

open_source.title: Telegram Ingestion Pipeline
open_source.description: Transforms Telegram channel data into structured, AI-enriched records for real-time analytics.
open_source.short_description: Transforms Telegram channel data into structured, AI-enriched records for real-time analytics.

open_source.title: Semantic API (Vector Search)
open_source.description: FastAPI service for embedding-based retrieval and vector similarity search (pgvector).
open_source.short_description: FastAPI service for embedding-based retrieval and vector similarity search (pgvector).
